question: Describe the officers braid on the service coat
canonical_answer: General officers will wear a 1 1/2 inch wide blue sleeve braid, 3 inches for the end of the sleeve. All others will wear a 1/2 inch wide blue sleeve braid 3 inches from the end of the sleeve
